steps.title: Compute the result
steps.content:
Evaluate the power then multiply.
$$f(5)=4\cdot 32=128$$
That confirms D is correct.

steps.title: Confirm the answer
steps.content: The final check is to match the computed result to the answer choices. The value or equation found above matches the correct answer, $128$. The other choices do not satisfy the same condition from the question, so D is correct.
